description_long: This stuffed toy is designed to resemble a cartoonish white bear with a large, rounded head and body. It features oversized black eyes with blue irises, thick black eyebrows, and a small black nose, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance. The bear has pink blush spots on its cheeks and a wide, slightly open mouth, adding to its expressive face. It wears a black top hat and a black bow tie, with two black buttons on its torso, enhancing its formal and playful look. The arms are outstretched to the sides, and the hands and feet are tipped with a light lavender color. The overall surface appears soft and plush, typical of a cuddly stuffed animal.
description: A white cartoon bear stuffed toy with a black top hat, bow tie, and outstretched arms, featuring large expressive eyes and pink cheeks. Its surface is soft and plush, with lavender accents on the hands and feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bear's face, black top hat, bow tie, buttons, and outstretched arms with lavender-tipped hands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bear's rounded profile, protruding snout, and the side of the top hat and ear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and arms, with the top hat and ears visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bear's profile, snout, and the side of the top hat and ear, mirroring the left side.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: cartoon white bear with a black top hat and bow tie
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is friendly and inviting, with large open eyes, raised eyebrows, and a small open mouth. Pink blush on the cheeks adds to the cheerful and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms outstretched to the sides and legs slightly apart.
